name: dcness
description: Claude Code PR workflow guard that stops skipped tests, skipped reviews, and out-of-bound agent writes before PRs.

metadata.description: dcNess — Claude Code 가 테스트/리뷰/파일 경계를 건너뛰기 전에 막는 PR workflow guard. release 브랜치 배포 (docs/internal/ · docs/archive/ 미포함).

plugins.name: dcness
plugins.description: Claude Code PR workflow guard — skipped tests, skipped reviews, and out-of-bound agent writes are blocked before PRs.
